channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Bedroom furniture dumped in the woods, 25th March
item.description:
Mattress, bed and chairs dumped in a beautiful forest. Not visible from the road as it is off a steep drop.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Buckholt Road, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Potholes across with of road by crossing, 25th March
item.description:
Potholes across with of road by pedestrian crossing.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Shelburne Road, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping on road to Zoons Farm, 25th March
item.description:
Several black bags of rubbish have been dumped on side of lane up to Zoons Farm just after the bridge over the A417

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brockworth Bypass, Hucclecote, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 3 Metal signs have been left at the entrance to the Footpath off Larkhay roadh., 25th March
item.description:
The signs are at the entrance to a footpath off Larkhay Rd and beside the st philips & st james church gate. They have been there several weeks, since the work to the path was completed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Noake Road, Hucclecote, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Signs & Barriers left behind by Contractor

item.title: Fly tipping, 25th March
item.description:
Owner of 10 Alstone Lane has dumped this on the pavement. Front Garden has been full of rubbish for years. Makes the area look like an absolute dump.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 10, Alstone Lane, Alstone, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 25th March
item.description:
This rubbish appeared on Monday. The piece of furniture that was dumped there on Saturday has now gone.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 66, Pates Avenue, Alstone, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole, 25th March
item.description:
Inside lane Northbound - on the outside part of the inside lane just before J11 about 200 yards before small blue sign that says M5 B 83.5
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): M5, Churchdown, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 25th March
item.description:
Cway pothole Stat plan required 700mmx600mmx41mm Road closure TM required No parking cones required (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Covers, Gratings & Frames problem, 25th March
item.description:
Loose rattling cover Please lift and reset 600x600mm approx 2 way lights Stats (Broken Chamber Cover/Frame)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 25th March
item.description:
15DB Fway abrupt level difference 600mm x 500mm x 20mm around BT cover STAT PLAN REQUIRED Please make safe with M60 materials Fway closure TM required (FW6 Abrupt Level Differences)
Report on FixMyStreet
